metadata.description: Go to We Work Remotely (https://weworkremotely.com). Find any remote job listing in the 'Back-End Programming' category and save it by clicking the 'Save Job' button on the job detail page.

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction:
Go to We Work Remotely (https://weworkremotely.com). Find any remote job listing in the 'Back-End Programming' category and save it by clicking the 'Save Job' button on the job detail page.

Note: The user is already logged in. Any available Back-End Programming job listing works. The 'Save Job' button appears on the individual job detail page. After clicking, the button changes to 'Remove Job' to confirm success.
